name: io.github.sciple-idp/sciple-mcp
title: Sciple Platform
description: Sciple platform MCP: services, dashboards, runbooks, tickets, environments, AWS cloud inventory.

environmentVariables.name: SCIPLE_PLATFORM_URL
environmentVariables.description: Sciple platform base URL (e.g. https://your.sciple.cloud). Optional — when omitted, the server uses the default platform recorded in the OAuth credential cache. Set this only when multiple platforms are cached.
